description: Togethernet is a 13-year-old non-profit organization founded and run by committed students at Stockholm Science & Innovation School to create fun events for all students. At the beginning of each school year we hold a “Killergame” called QRTag where a quarter of the school’s students participate. Togethernet also organizes a LAN once a semester where 100 students spend the night at the school with games, tournaments and other fun activities.
Specializing in Business Research Methods and Strategic HRM. Applying analytical frameworks to human capital management.
